ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for reference */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was issued */,
  "invoice_type" INTEGER /* Type of invoice (e.g., Billing, Expense) */,
  "billed_to_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client (billed to) ID */,
  "invoice_value" REAL /* Total value of the invoice */,
  "invoice_currency" INTEGER /* Currency of the invoice */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for payment */,
  "invoice_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the invoice */,
  "billed_to_zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the billed to address */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the invoice (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "invoice_status_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment status was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the invoice */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the invoice */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was last updated */,
  "invoice_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the invoice */,
  "invoice_terms" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the invoice */,
  "invoice_note" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_invoice_type FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_type") REFERENCES invoice_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_payment_status FOREIGN KEY ("payment_status") REFERENCES payment_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_invoice_currency FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_billed_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("billed_to_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "client_email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "client_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "client_country_code" INTEGER /* Country code of the client */,
  "client_zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the client's address */,
  "client_address_1" TEXT /* Primary address line 1 */,
  "client_address_2" TEXT /* Primary address line 2 */,
  "client_city" TEXT /* City of the client's address */,
  "client_state" TEXT /* State of the client's address */,
  "client_country" TEXT /* Country of the client's address */,
  "client_fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the client */,
  "client_website" TEXT /* Website of the client */,
  "client_vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number of the client */,
  "client_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the invoice type (e.g., Billing, Expense) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the invoice type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., INR, USD) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., Indian Rupee, US Dollar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice ID */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" INTEGER /* Method of payment (e.g., Bank Transfer, Credit Card) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "payment_status_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment status was last updated */,
  "payment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the payment record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the payment record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Bank Transfer, Credit Card) */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Finance Manager, Client Service) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice ID */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user ID */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., Created, Updated, Paid) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., Active, Deleted) */,
  "log_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "log_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_logs_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invoice ID */,
  "summary_text" TEXT /* Text of the invoice summary */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date the summary was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_summaries_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)
